diagrams.title: Permission String Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how to interpret the 10-character permission string from ls -l output
diagrams.purpose: Understanding ls -l output format for file permissions

diagrams.title: Numeric Permission Calculation
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how numeric permissions are calculated from rwx values
elements: Add values for each category (owner, group, others)
diagrams.purpose: Calculate permissions quickly using octal numbers

diagrams.title: Special Permissions with SetUID Bit
diagrams.description: Shows executable file with SetUID permission showing 's' in owner execute position
elements: Owner execute shows 'S' (capital) because no execute permission existed
diagrams.purpose: Understanding special permission display in ls -l output

diagrams.title: umask Calculation Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step showing how umask affects default permissions for files and directories
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how umask determines default file/directory permissions

visuals.title: Changing File Permissions
visuals.description: Visual diagram for changing file permissions
